gherkin:
When the user visits the Operator tool and logs in
Then the user should be successfully logged into the platform
When the user navigates to the "Media Validation" page
Then the user should be taken to the "Media Validation" page
And the user should see "Litmus" on the top header of the page
When the user clicks on the "Validation Suite" dropdown for the first game within the schedule
And the user selects a validation suite from the dropdown
And the user clicks on the "Run Validation" button for the first game within the schedule
Then the "Validation Suite" field for the first game should display the selected suite name
And the "Validation Result" field for the first game should display "PASS" or "FAIL"
And the user should see the following data for each row of the validation suite for the first game:
Name | Description | Result

steps.action: *When* the user visits the Operator tool and logs in

*And* the user should see "Litmus" on the top header of the page

*And* the user clicks on the "Run Validation" button for the first game within the schedule
steps.result:

*And* the "Validation Result" field for the first game should display "PASS" or "FAIL"
